title: Soulection Radio Show #408 (Andres Javier Uribe Radio)
content:
[Andres Javier Uribe](https://twitter.com/Andres_J_Uribe) ties up Joe Kay and takes over Soulection Radio
{{< tweet 1129838552764674048 >}}
Follow Andres Javier Uribe on [Twitter](https://twitter.com/Andres_J_Uribe), and [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/andres.j.uribe/)
